content: Self-Refine's task-specific iterative output refinement and Reflexion's dynamic long-term self-memory can be combined into a layered autonomous improvement framework: Self-Refine handles fine-grained, task-level correction of individual outputs, while Reflexion accumulates cross-task reflective patterns into persistent memory to speed up refinement in future similar tasks. This hybrid system retains Self-Refine's key advantage of needing no additional supervised training or fine-tuning, while solving the problem of Self-Refine reinventing the correction wheel for every new task.
